creator: rainbow@sanitylinux.org
text:
Created attachment 189189
vzvol.shar

Submission of sysutils/vzvol, a tool written in the vein of iocage to simplify management of zvols, and utilize them in virtualization.
vzvol currently allows one to list zvols, delete zvols, create zvols, change ownership, format them with various Filesystems, and create a shim .VMDK pointing to a zvol for use with VirtualBox.

I am the creator of vzvol, and am willing to ensure the port receives an update within minutes of the program receiving an official point, minor, or major release.
